generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T LAMIUM. Lamium album, Linn. Natural order , Labiatæ. Common names , Dead-nettle; (Germ.), Taub-Nessel; (Fr.), L'Ortie Blanche. Preparation , Tincture of (leaves and) flowers. Authorities. Archiv f. Hom., 12, 2, 179; 1 , Hahnemann; 2 , Franz; 3 , Kummer; 4 , Langhammer; 5 , Stapf. MIND. ► Weeping mood; she wept as if she had been abandoned, [1] . ► Extraordinary sadness; he thought he had been blamed for reverses for which he was blameless, and in consequence was obliged to suffer; though not without desire for work, [4] . ► Anxiety during the chill; she could find rest neither while sitting, standing, nor walking, [1] . ► Discontented with his work (after four days), [3] . ► One or another text recurs constantly in her thoughts numberless times in succession, and she is unable to prevent its repetition in her mind, so that at last she becomes sad about it, and thinks she shall lose her reason, [1] . HEAD. ► Confusion. ► Confusion of the head; he cannot perfectly collect his senses, and is obliged to make an effort in talking, [2] . ► General Head. ► Great mobility of the head, especially from before backward, [3] . ► Headache in the morning on waking and on walking in the open air, [1] . ► Headache, worse on rising from a chair, better while sitting, [1] . [10.] ► An indescribable headache deep in the brain, like the beginning of a very violent headache, and as if she was about to be very sick, worse when rising up after stooping (it disappeared at night during sleep); (after two hours), [1] . ► Headache in the morning in bed, worse while lying down, a confusion as after a night's debauch: the head feels as though constricted with a cord; it disappears on rising, [1] . ► Headache like a compression of the brain from all sides, so that the most violent pain is in the middle of the brain (immediately), [1] . ► Headache about 10 P.M.; at first some stitches here and there, and then throbbing and violent shaking chill in bed, [1] . ► Headache (like a tearing) lasting from 6 P.M. till midnight, [1] . ► Temples. ► Pressive pain in the right temporal region (after one hour), [3] . ► Drawing, needlelike stitches in the left temple, [4] . ► Very acute pain in the temples, as if internally sore, [2] . ► Occiput. ► Pain in the occiput, as if it were lying upon a stone, and as if the bed were too hard, when lying upon either side, [1] . ► External Head. ► The scalp is very tense, especially in the region of the coronal suture (after six hours), [3] . EYE. [20.] ► Itching in the canthi at various times, especially in the evening; is obliged to rub them (after twelve hours), [3] . ► Itching on the lower lid which compels rubbing (after one hour), [3] . ► Pressure on the eyeball, and dim indistinct vision, especially in the evening, [3] . ► Pupils extremely dilated (after seventeen hours), [4] . ► Contraction of the pupils (after three hours and a half), [4] . EAR. ► Deafness, [1] . NOSE. ► Sneezing from time to time; several drops of water flow from the nose at times (after a quarter of an hour), [3] . ► Violent coryza (after a few hours), [2] . ► She blows blood from the nose, [1] . ► Bruised pain in the soft parts on both sides of the nose, but not painful to touch, [1] . FACE. [30.] ► Stitches in the right side of the lower jaw, behind the ear, [1] . THROAT. ► Thick mucus, which has a very sour taste, is raised from the fauces by hawking (after one hour), [3] . ► Sore throat internally when swallowing (after a chill), as if a lump were in the throat; next morning there was not only the same pain on swallowing, but also a pain in the tonsils on moving the neck, on swallowing, and feeling of it, [1] . ► Scraping in the throat, [5] . STOMACH. ► Thirst. ► Constant thirst, though not during the chill, [1] . ► Eructation. ► Empty eructations (immediately), [3] . ► Acid eructations, [5] . ► Waterbrash, two evenings in succession, [1] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► Nausea and vomiting of food eaten an hour and a half previously, preceded by unusual heat and great weariness and exhaustion; therewith, it became black before the eyes, [2] . ► Stomach. ► Pressure beneath the pit of the stomach while eating, during he was qualmish and nauseated, almost as in waterbrash, but no liquid came into the mouth, [1] . [40.] ► Stitches in the pit of the stomach, [1] . ► He feels the pulse in the pit of the stomach, and even sees it externally, [2] . ► Crawling in the stomach, with qualmishness, [5] . ABDOMEN. ► Hypochondria. ► Rumbling in the hypochondriac region (after eight to ten hours), [3] . ► A dull uneasy pain in the hepatic region, which could only be relieved by laying the hand upon it, [1] . ► Bruised pain in the abdominal muscles beneath the false ribs, [1] . ► General Abdomen. ► Unusual distension of the abdomen, for several days, [1] . ► Sensation in the abdomen as if diarrha would come on, followed by a pasty stool (after a few hours), [2] . ► Colic as from incarcerated flatus (after three-quarters of an hour), [4] . ► Griping colic, as from incarceration of flatus, which, after a subsequent stool with emission of much flatus, still continues for some time (after twelve hours), [4] . ► Hypogastrium and Iliac Regions. [50.] ► A griping in the lower abdomen, and most violent excitement, as if menstruation would come on, lasting two days (after three-hours), [1] . [In a woman who had been for some time free from menstruation on account of her age.] ► A dragging in the left side of the abdomen down in the public region, as if a hernia would protrude there, [2] . STOOL. ► A dragging and pressure, as if for stool, though only in the rectum; soon followed by a start stool, [3] . ► Stool pasty, hard, with the passage of some blood, [1] . URINARY ORGANS. ► Urethra. ► Some moisture flows through the urethra (after two days), [3] . ► Sensation in the urethra as though a drop of water were flowing through it, though no moisture was noticed at the orifice (after six to ten hours), [3] . ► Painless sensation, like a burning, in the middle of the urethra when not urinating (after four hours), [3] . ► Micturition. ► Urging to urinate, with extremely little discharge (after one hour and a half), [4] . ► Frequent urging to urinate, with more scanty discharge than usual (after two hours), [3] . ► Frequent micturition, [5] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Male. [60.] ► Tickling in the glans penis (after half an hour), [3] . ► Female. ► Great excitement in the uterus (in the lower abdomen), but especially a cutting above the hips, as if menstruation would suddenly appear, though it had just ceased, [1] . ► Discharge of leucorrha, with a biting sensation of the parts (after one hour), [1] . ► A few drops of leucorrha frequently passes from the vagina, [1] . ► Profuse leucorrha, without sensation (after ten hours), [1] . ► Menstruation some days too early and very scanty (after five days), [1] . ► Menstruation eleven days too early, at the new moon (after seven days), [1] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► The voice is very weak and unsteady, as in one who feels anxious, [2] . ► When speaking, he cannot get his breath; his chest feels quite weak, [2] . CHEST. ► A feeling of pressure on the chest and nausea which make him very anxious, [2] . [70.] ► Burning in the middle of the chest or in the sophagus, always after eating or drinking, [1] . ► A pressive pain above the left nipple, most violent while slumbering; noticed while partly waking from sleep, but not when fully awake, [3] . ► Pain from the left breast to the shoulder as if beaten and strained, [1] . BACK. ► Pain in the small of the back, as if it had been beaten, [2] . ► Dull stitches in the region of the right kidney on taking a deep breath (after ten hours), [3] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► A drawing tearing here and there in the upper and lower limbs (after twenty-four hours), [3] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Heaviness and weakness of the right arm, especially during rest (after four hours), [3] . ► Bruised pain in the inner surface of the arm, especially at the bend of the elbow, mostly noticed on stretching out the arm, [1] . ► Crawling numbness, and a feeling as if asleep, of the back of the hand and ball of the thumb (sensitive to touch), with a painfulness of the skin of these parts, only on moving the hand, and a fine sticking smarting as if they had been switched, [1] . ► Cramplike tearing in the muscle of the right thumb (after three hours), [4] . [80.] ► Drawing tearing in the first phalanx of the left index finger (after three hours), [3] . ► Drawing tearing on the first joint of the two last fingers of the right hand (after six hours), [3] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Intermitting drawing, pressive tearing on the lower posterior muscles of the right thigh (while sitting) , (after fourteen hours), [4] . ► Pain in the bend of the thigh as if bruised, or as if he had walked a long distance (on moving about and when sitting), (after eight hours), [3] . ► Tension across the middle of the calves while walking, as if they were unyielding, [2] . ► A cramplike pain and a bruised sensation externally in the right fibula, [2] . ► Gnawing, pressive pain in the lower portion of the tibia and in the ankle, with a sensation of heat and a feeling as if the part were swollen, [2] . ► Cramplike pressive pain on the ball of the left great toe, while sitting (after two hours and three-quarters), [4] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Uneasiness of mind and body, so that he took up a book and laid it down again, sat now here, now there; always according to involuntary fancies (after two to ten hours), [3] . ► Great uneasiness and anxiety; they did not allow him to remain in any place; with trembling of the limbs, [2] . [90.] ► General weakness of the body (after eight hours), [3] . ► General weakness, mostly in the hands, during the chill, [1] . SKIN. ► A pimple in the fold near the right wing of the nose, which itches and is painfully sore when touched, [1] . ► A blister forms on the heel from slight rubbing while walking, which breaks and becomes a long-lasting ulcer, superficial, with a red and swollen areola, and painful like a smarting and fine sticking and afterwards a biting; in the morning in bed; it is painful in the evening, smarting and sticking, worse while lying (after twenty-four hours), [1] . ► A corroding, fine sticking-itching on the arms, hands, and neck, [1] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Wakefulness and restlessness; she was unable to fall asleep in the evening and frequently woke, [1] . ► Difficult falling asleep at night, and after falling asleep, a vivid, anxious dream, which woke her; but after falling asleep again she dreamed the same thing, [1] . ► Vivid, disagreeable, anxious, unremembered dreams, [4] . ► Dreams that menstruation, which had recently ceased, would reappear, [1] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Paleness of the face and chilliness over the whole body, with internal trembling, at 4 P.M.; the whole body was covered with gooseflesh, especially painful as if sore and abraded when touched on the upper arm, on the outer side of the thigh, together with anxiety and uneasiness, she tosses about here and there, wanted to sleep but could not, [1] . ► Heat. [100.] ► Burning heat of both cheeks, without redness or thirst (after twenty-four hours), [4] . ► Burning heat of the cheeks, with cold hands, without thirst (after twenty-four hours), [4] . ► Sweat. ► Perspiration in the morning in bed, together with chilliness and gooseflesh, with anxious heat on the slightest motion or exertion of even talking immediately disappearing when at rest or on ceasing to talk, whereupon the chilliness immediately returned; therewith the hands were sweaty internally, [1] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), On waking, headache; in bed, worse while lying down, disappearing on rising, headache; in bed perspiration, etc. ► ( Evening ), Itching in canthi; waterbrash. ► ( In open air ), Headache. ► ( Drinking ), Burning in chest, etc. ► ( Eating ), Pressure beneath pit of stomach; burning in chest, etc. ► ( Rest ), Heaviness, etc., of arm. ► ( Rising from stooping ), Indescribable headache. ► Amelioration. ► ( Sitting ), Headache. Clinical: Hæmorrhoids; Headache; Hernia; Leucorrhœa; Menstruation, too early

Voice weak and faltering, as from mental agitation. Want of breath when speaking, with weakness of the chest. Anxious pressure on chest, with nausea. Torpor and crawling numbness of back of hand, and of the fleshy part of thumb, by touch, with painful sensation of rawness in the parts on moving the hand. Tearing and drawing in fingers. Intermitting drawing, pressive tearing on lower posterior muscles of r. thigh (while sitting). Blister on heel from slight rubbing, afterwards bursting and changing to an ulcer with smarting and biting. Tearing and drawing in limbs. Great restlessness of body and mind, with trembling of limbs.

keynotes.text: Lamium was proved by Hahnemann and others, including Stapf. It produced headaches of several kinds, one a "deep-in" headache like that of Bacil.; tightness of scalp; and a backward and forward motion of the head. Much uneasiness of mind and body; trembling of limbs; weakness during the chill. Tearing and drawing in the limbs. The menses appeared too early and were scanty. Much leucorrhœa, with biting sensation or without sensation, white mucus. Farrington says Lamium has been recommended for external piles. "Hard stool with blood" is the nearest symptom bearing on this. A characteristic symptom seenms to be "backward and forward motion of head." Symptoms were in morning on waking (headache); while lying down in bed in morning, > on rising (headache); > on sitting (headache); in open air (headache); by drinking (burning in chest) by eating (pressure beneath pit of stomach; burning in chest) rising from stooping (indescribable headache).

_raw: Compare: Other members of the Mint tribe (Hedeoma, Ocimum canum, Origanum, Mentha piperita); "deep-in" headache, Bacil.; head moves backwards and forwards, Arn., Cham., Lyc.

mental_emotional.text: Whining mood, inclination to weep, feels as if abandoned. Great sadness, with lachrymose humour. Great agitation and anxiety, which permit no rest.

head.text: Aching in centre of brain, on rising from a stooping posture. Headache, by rising from a seat, > when seated. Cephalalgia, as if brain were compressed on all sides, with very violent pains in centre of brain. Excessive tightness of scalp, esp. near coronal suture. Great mobility of head, esp. from before backward. Sight and hearing are diminished.

mouth_throat.text: Hawking up of thick mucus of an acid taste, which is detached from bottom of gullet.

stomach_abdomen.text: Burning pain in middle of chest, or in œsophagus, after eating or drinking anything whatever. Nausea and vomiting of food, with heat, great lassitude, excessive dejection, and cloudiness of sight. Excessive distension of the abdomen. Pinching in the abdomen, as from incarcerated flatus, which is not > by expulsion of the wind. A dragging in l. side of abdomen down into pubic region as if a hernia would protrude there. Great agitation in the abdomen, as if catamenia were about to come on violently.

stool_rectum.text: Evacuations of the consistence of pap, hard, with emission of blood.

urinary.text: Urgent want to urinate, with very scanty emission. Discharge of serum from the urethra.

female.text: Catamenia too early and too scanty; eleven days too early at the new moon. Leucorrhœa, sometimes with a biting sensation in genitals. Leucorrhœa profuse, painless, white mucus.

back.text: Bruised pain in small of back.

skin.text: Smarting and stinging in the ulcer ( in evening when lying) with redness and swelling around it, and smarting early in morning in bed. Ulcers, with pain as from excoriation, and shootings.

fever_chill.text: Shivering, with general weakness, or with anxiety. Burning heat in both cheeks, without redness, and without thirst. Constant thirst, except during shivering fit. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
